notes: W011 is heuristic on `gh pr view`/external CLI handoff and persists regardless of mitigations. Severity `high` was confirmed by CI on commit `f21c5fd` (the same scanner run that validated `ship-it`'s W011 escalation — see commit message); this PR's bump is the coordination half of a cross-PR cycle so PR #155 and PR #156 do not block each other on the security-scan gate. Without this bump, PR #155 would fail the scan with a `medium` → `high` escalation regression because the pr-comments baseline on `main` still records `medium`. Spec 39 (PR #156) ships the full Security model description for pr-comments and is the canonical owner of these notes.
